input.command:
COH="/Users/steven/Library/Application Support/LaunchCat/coh"
echo "=== client process ==="
ps -axo pid,pcpu,rss,etime,command | awk '/cityofheroes\.exe/ && !/awk/ {printf "pid=%s cpu=%s%% rss_mb=%.0f etime=%s\n",$1,$2,$3/1024,$4}'
echo "=== wineserver ==="
ps -axo pid,pcpu,etime,command | awk '/LaunchCat\/coh\/wine\/bin\/wineserver/ && !/awk/ {printf "wineserver pid=%s cpu=%s%% etime=%s\n",$1,$2,$3}'
echo "=== windows ==="
osascript <<'AS' 2>/dev/null
tell application "System Events"
  set out to ""
  repeat with p in (every process whose name is "wine64-preloader")
    try
      repeat with w in (windows of p)
        set out to out & "  - " & (name of w as string) & linefeed
      end repeat
    end try
  end repeat
  return out
end tell
AS
echo "=== last client stderr ==="
tail -8 /tmp/coh-client.out 2>/dev/null
input.description: Confirm CoH client health during login
